zh.Plaine, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France: 法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾普萊
zh.lifeSummary: 當Dominique GRANDADAM於大約1670年出生在法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾普萊時，他的父親Nicolas Grandadam dit l'Homme48歲，母親Mougeotte LE BETZ44歲。他於1695年與Marie MARTIN在法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾可爾洛-拉-洛結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1735年在他的家鄉享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dominique GRANDADAM于大约1670年出生在法国阿爾薩斯巴-爾普萊时，他的父亲Nicolas Grandadam dit l'Homme48岁，母亲Mougeotte LE BETZ44岁。他于1695年与Marie MARTIN在法国阿爾薩斯巴-爾可爾洛-拉-洛结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1735年在他的家乡享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dominique
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of   Dominic  , from a French form that is used as both a girl's and a boy's name.

historicEvents.title: The Palace of Versailles
historicEvents.description: The Palace of Versailles was originally known as a hunting log and retreat for Louis XII. When Louis XIV took over he moved his family into it. After he died the palace was abandoned. It has since been turned into a museum.

historicEvents.title: French Monarchy
historicEvents.description: The French monarchy started way before the 1700s, but for the most part the major events of history took place during this time before the French Revolution started. This was known as the Bourbon Dynasty. Louis XIV the Great, Louis XV the Beloved, Louis XVI the Restorer of French Liberty, and Louis XVII all reigned during this time.

en.lifeSummary: When Dominique GRANDADAM was born about 1670, in Plaine, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France, his father, Nicolas Grandadam dit l'Homme, was 48 and his mother, Mougeotte LE BETZ, was 44. He married Marie MARTIN in 1695, in Colroy-la-Roche, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died about 1735, in his hometown, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dominique GRANDADAM est né environ 1670, à Plaine, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France, son père, Nicolas Grandadam dit l'Homme, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Mougeotte LE BETZ, avait 44 ans. Il a épousé Marie MARTIN en 1695, à Colroy-la-Roche, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé environ 1735, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.Colroy-la-Roche, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Franc: Colroy la Roche, Niederrhein, Elsaß, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Dominique GRANDADAM um 1670 in Blen, Niederrhein, Elsaß, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicolas Grandadam dit l'Homme 48 und seine Mutter Mougeotte LE BETZ 44. Er hat 1695 in Colroy la Roche, Niederrhein, Elsaß, Frankreich Marie MARTIN geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1735 im Alter von 67 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dominique GRANDADAM è nato il circa 1670 nel Plaine, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia, il suo padre, Nicolas Grandadam dit l'Homme, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Mougeotte LE BETZ, aveva 44 anni. Lui sposato Marie MARTIN nel 1695, nel Colroy-la-Roche, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1735, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Dominique GRANDADAMが約1670年にフランスアルサスバス-ルヒンプレアインで生まれた時，父Nicolas Grandadam dit l'Hommeは48歳，母Mougeotte LE BETZは44歳であった。1695年にフランスアルサスバス-ルヒンコルロイ-ラ-ロチェでMarie MARTINと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は約1735年に故郷で67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Dominique GRANDADAM(이)가 대략 1670년 프랑스 알사스 바스-히 플레이인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicolas Grandadam dit l'Homme(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Mougeotte LE BETZ(은)는 44세였다. 그는 1695년 프랑스 알사스 바스-히 코로이-라-록헤에서 Marie MARTIN(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1735년 그의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.ABT 1670–ABT 1735: tany ho any amin'ny 1670–tany ho any amin'ny 1735

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dominique GRANDADAM nasceu aproximadamente 1670, em Plaine, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, França, seu pai, Nicolas Grandadam dit l'Homme, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Mougeotte LE BETZ, tinha 44 anos. Ele casou-se com Marie MARTIN em 1695, em Colroy-la-Roche, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1735, em sua cidade natal, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dominique GRANDADAM родился около 1670 г. в местности плеин, бас-рин, алсеис, Франция, его отцу по имени Nicolas Grandadam dit l'Homme было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Mougeotte LE BETZ, 44. Он женился на женщине по имени Marie MARTIN в 1695 г. в местности колрои-ла-рош, бас-рин, алсеис, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер около 1735 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 67 лет.

sm.ABT 1670–ABT 1735: e tusa o le 1670–e tusa o le 1735

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dominique GRANDADAM nació aproximadamente 1670, en Plaine, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia, su papá, Nicolas Grandadam dit l'Homme, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Mougeotte LE BETZ, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Marie MARTIN en 1695, en Colroy-la-Roche, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1735, en su pueblo, a la edad de 67 años.
